# CalcPhi — Country-Specific Financial Calculators
# https://calcphi.com
# Built by Black Belt Code Labs
# Last updated: April 2026

## About
CalcPhi is a free financial calculator platform with country-specific tools for India and Australia (US and UK coming). Every calculator uses the correct tax rules, pension systems, and financial regulations for each country. No sign-up. No data collection. All calculations run entirely in the browser.

## Countries Live

### India
URL: https://calcphi.com/in/
108 calculators + 35 blog guides built for Indian investors.
Regulations: SEBI, RBI, EPFO, Income Tax Act, GST, Payment of Gratuity Act.

### Australia
URL: https://calcphi.com/au/
Calculators built for Australian investors.
Regulations: ATO, APRA, ASIC, ASFA retirement standards, state stamp duty schedules.

### United States (Coming 2026)
URL: https://calcphi.com/us/

### United Kingdom (Coming 2026)
URL: https://calcphi.com/uk/

---

## Australia — Calculator Pages
- Australia Hub: https://calcphi.com/au/
(Superannuation, stamp duty, HECS, income tax, mortgage, negative gearing — launching Q3 2026)

---

## Calculation Formulas Used
- SIP: Future Value of Annuity Due — monthly compounding
- EMI: [P × R × (1+R)^N] / [(1+R)^N - 1]
- PPF: Annual compounding at 7.1% (FY 2025-26 government rate)
- EPF: Annual compounding at 8.15% (FY 2025-26 EPFO rate)
- RD/FD: Quarterly compounding per RBI guidelines
- Income Tax: FY 2025-26 slabs, both old and new regime
- HRA: Minimum of 3 limits per Section 10(13A)
- LTCG: 12.5% above ₹1.25 lakh exemption (post Budget 2024)
- GST: CGST + SGST for intra-state, IGST for inter-state
- Gratuity: Payment of Gratuity Act 1972
